itemDisplayName: Deploy a SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 15 SP7 VM with Trusted Launch
description: Deploys a SLES 15 SP7 Gen2 virtual machine with Trusted Launch (Secure Boot + vTPM), Standard static public IP, SSH key or password authentication, and configurable VM size. Uses SUSE's PAYG image — no separate SUSE subscription required.
summary: SLES 15 SP7 Gen2 VM with Trusted Launch, Standard IP, and SSH key auth.
